title: Spiritual Coaching Agreement
description: Spiritual growth and mindfulness mentoring agreement outlining session boundaries and personal growth targets.
whatsCovered: Spiritual mentoring session layout and scheduling
Personal development disclaimer: client is responsible for own choices
Freedom of religious belief and boundaries of coaching
whenToUse: Use this contract when guiding clients through meditation practices, mindfulness journals, or spiritual exploration sessions.

fields.label: Client Street Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 200 Summit Blvd, Suite 400, Chicago, IL

clauses.heading: SPIRITUAL COACHING AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This professional services agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {provider_name}, located at {provider_address} ("Provider"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Client").

clauses.heading: 1. Independent Contractor Status
clauses.body: Provider acts solely as an independent contractor. Nothing in this Agreement shall construct an employer-employee relationship, partnership, or joint venture between the parties.

clauses.heading: 2. Coaching Engagement
clauses.body: Provider shall supply Client with {spiritual_sessions_count} spiritual growth mentoring sessions. Sessions shall follow the schedules and calendar bookings approved by both parties.

clauses.heading: 3. Mental and Physical Health Disclaimer
clauses.body: Client acknowledges that coaching services do not constitute psychiatric therapy, clinical psychology, medical treatment, or healthcare services. If Client has psychiatric or medical issues, they agree to seek licensed medical professionals.

clauses.heading: Confidentiality & Trade Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all business plans, customer metrics, financial spreadsheets, and personal disclosures shared during the engagement as strictly confidential.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I edit this contract template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom annexes for specific consulting milestones or agendas.

faq.question: Is this agreement suitable for international clients?
faq.answer: Yes, the contract includes governing law and independent contractor clauses that are easily adaptable for cross-border coaching or consulting.
